title: first_word
subject:
Write a program that takes one string and prints its first word, followed by a newline. A word is a sequence of characters that are neither spaces nor tabs. Leading spaces/tabs are ignored.

If the number of arguments is not exactly 1, or the string has no word, print just a newline.

Examples:
  $ ./a.out "Hello World"
  Hello
  $ ./a.out "   the quick brown"
  the
